# Hello, world

This is a generic Jekyll/Hugo-style Markdown blog post. It has YAML
frontmatter (so the `frontmatter-fence` clause matches) but it is NOT
a DESIGN.md — the filename is `blog-post.md`, not `DESIGN.md`, and it
has no `name:` key or canonical token-group keys.

The DESIGN.md detector MUST NOT match this file.
